name: Kotak Mojo Platinum Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹1,50,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 5X Reward Points on dining and entertainment spends
2 Reward Points per ₹150 on all other purchases

welcomeBenefits.description: 1,000 bonus Reward Points on card activation

additionalBenefits: 5X rewards on dining and entertainment for lifestyle spenders
Complimentary Swiggy One membership for 3 months
pros: Strong 5X rewards on dining and entertainment categories
Decent domestic lounge access for a mid-tier card
Good for lifestyle and entertainment spenders
cons: Limited redemption options compared to premium cards
idealFor: Users who frequently spend on dining and entertainment
Movie and nightlife enthusiasts looking for targeted rewards

faqs.question: What counts as entertainment spending?
faqs.answer: Entertainment includes movie tickets (BookMyShow, PVR), OTT subscriptions, amusement parks, and similar leisure activities.

faqs.question: How do I redeem Reward Points?
faqs.answer: You can redeem points for gift vouchers, statement credits, or products through the Kotak rewards catalogue via net banking or the Kotak app.

faqs.question: Is the fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹999 annual fee is waived if you spend ₹1,50,000 or more in the previous year.
